name: oat-tools-vscode
description: Monorepo for Owen's Applied Thinking VS Code extensions

scripts.test: node extensions/table-tools/test/parseTables.test.js && node extensions/table-tools/test/tableImageWidth.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/imagePipeline.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/assetLedgerD1.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/imageAssetsRepo.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/reviewImageNeedCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/localFileIntakeCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/urlIntakeCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/ledgerApiClient.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/ledgerBrowseCommands.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/imagePanelProvider.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/plannedPlacementRun.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/plannedPlacementRunCommand.test.js && node tools/d1/worker/ledgerApiWorker.test.js
scripts.test:image-staging: node extensions/image-staging/test/imagePipeline.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/assetLedgerD1.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/imageAssetsRepo.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/reviewImageNeedCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/localFileIntakeCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/urlIntakeCommand.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/ledgerApiClient.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/ledgerBrowseCommands.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/imagePanelProvider.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/plannedPlacementRun.test.js && node extensions/image-staging/test/plannedPlacementRunCommand.test.js
scripts.ledger:migrations:list:local: wrangler d1 migrations list oat-publishing-ledger --local --config tools/d1/worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.ledger:migrations:apply:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply oat-publishing-ledger --local --config tools/d1/worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.ledger:migrations:apply:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply oat-publishing-ledger --remote --config tools/d1/worker/wrangler.jsonc
